case_title: HUANXIN LEI VS. VERITY WIRELESS, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,546.74 FILED BY LEI, HUANXIN AS TO DEFENDANT VERITY WIRELESS, INC. T-MOBILE USA, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-19-2020 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS - CONTINUE ORDER (FOR FEB-16-2021 HEARING DATE) RETURNED. SENT TO: DEFENDANT - VERITY WIRELESS, INC.;(ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - NO SUCH NUMBER - UNABLE TO FORWARD)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-16-2021 - JUDGMENT.
FILED REQUEST FOR INTERPRETER (CIVIL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEI, HUANXIN AS TO DEFENDANT VERITY WIRELESS, INC. T-MOBILE USA, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT VERITY WIRELESS, INC. T-MOBILE USA, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-19-2020 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO FEB-16-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF HUANXIN LEI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS VERITY WIRELESS AND T-MOBILE, INC ARE PRESENT BOTH ENTITIES ARE REPRESENTED BY JOHNNY SOHN, DIRECTOR. THE PLAINTIFF REQUESTED A CANTONESE INERPRETER (ACTUALLY HE SAID HE REQUESTED PREVIOULY). PARTIES CAME TO A PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT BEFORE COURT. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED, ON FEB-16-2021, IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE OR THE AGREEMENT IS BROKEN. IF NO APPEARANCE, THIS CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEI, HUANXIN AS TO DEFENDANT VERITY WIRELESS, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED OCT-19-2020, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VERITY WIRELESS, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT VERITY WIRELESS, INC. T-MOBILE USA, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEI, HUANXIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VERITY WIRELESS, INC. T-MOBILE USA, INC. $800.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $865.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER AND A PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-16-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-16-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. . PLAINTIFF HUANXIN LEI IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED CANTONESE INTERPRETER REBECCA CHAU. DEFENDANT VERITY WIRELESS, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JOHNNY SOHN, MANAGER. DEFENDANT T-MOBILE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JOHNNY SOHN, MANAGER. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
